Perfect! All the CLI flag renames have been completed successfully. Here's a summary of the changes made:
## Summary of Changes
I successfully renamed all CLI flag strings in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/workspace/create/test_plan_file_operations.py`:
### CLI Argument Renames (in `runner.invoke()` calls): - **`--from-plan-file` → `--from-pr-file`** (9 occurrences): - Line 47: test_create_with_plan_file() - Line 99: test_create_with_plan_file_removes_plan_word() - Line 127: test_create_plan_file_not_found() - Line 165: test_create_with_keep_plan_file_flag() - paired with --keep-pr-file - Line 222: test_create_with_plan_file_ensures_uniqueness() - Line 239: test_create_with_plan_file_ensures_uniqueness() - Line 298: test_create_with_long_plan_name_matches_branch_and_worktree()
- **`--keep-plan-file` → `--keep-pr-file`** (2 occurrences): - Line 165: test_create_with_keep_plan_file_flag() - paired with --from-pr-file - Line 191: test_create_keep_plan_file_without_plan_file_fails()
### String Assertions (flag names in error messages): - Line 196: Updated assertion from `"--keep-plan-file requires --from-plan-file"` to `"--keep-pr-file requires --from-pr-file"`
### Comments and Docstrings: - Line 63: Updated docstring from `"Test that --from-plan-file flag removes..."` to `"Test that --from-pr-file flag removes..."` - Line 136: Updated docstring from `"Test that --keep-plan-file copies..."` to `"Test that --keep-pr-file copies..."` - Line 182: Updated docstring from `"Test that --keep-plan-file without --from-plan-file..."` to `"Test that --keep-pr-file without --from-pr-file..."` - Line 200: Updated docstring from `"Test that --from-plan-file ensures..."` to `"Test that --from-pr-file ensures..."`
All changes were focused exclusively on CLI flag names in tests. No other functionality or non-flag-related strings were modified.
